description: Restructure your Zotero library by separating historical papers from modern ones. For all papers published before 1970, add the tag 'classic-era' and move them into a new collection named 'History of Computing'. Do not include any papers published in 1970 or later. Your library has been pre-loaded with a mix of classic CS/physics papers (1900s-1960s) and modern machine learning papers (2010s-2020s).
